Forms Documentation
===================

This section documents all the Django forms in the news application.

.. automodule:: news.forms
   :members:
   :undoc-members:
   :show-inheritance:

-----------------------

.. autoclass:: news.forms.UserRegistrationForm
   :members:
   :undoc-members:
   :show-inheritance:

-------------

   :members:
   :undoc-members:
   :show-inheritance:

   :members:
   :undoc-members:
   :show-inheritance:
